topics.title: George Takei's Acting Career and Show Feedback
topics.summary: The studio discusses George Takei's extensive acting career, his role in the series Heroes, and various listener reactions to recent segments involving Arty and guest performances.

topics.title: Musical Performance and Comedy Sketches
topics.summary: The studio features a failed attempt at a collaborative performance of "Imagine" followed by a comedy segment involving a public access show prank.

topics.title: Political Candidates and Media Mergers
topics.summary: The studio discusses the merits of Hillary Clinton over other candidates, the technical difficulties facing Riley's show, the regulatory hurdles surrounding satellite radio mergers, and a listener's tribute to a fan who passed away.

topics.title: Tavern on the Green and Satellite Merger Discussion
topics.summary: The studio discusses a dinner at Tavern on the Green, updates on a media merger involving XM and Sirius, and welcomes guest Ricky Lake.

topics.title: Ricky Lake Discusses Weight Loss and John Mayer
topics.summary: The studio features Ricky Lake discussing her recent weight loss journey, a film featuring nudity, and her ongoing text correspondence with musician John Mayer.

topics.title: Ricky Lake's Career and Personal Life
topics.summary: The studio features Ricky Lake discussing her past experiences with childhood abuse, the transition from hosting a high-paying talk show to acting in her new film "The Business of Being Born," her divorce, and various personal anecdotes regarding her health and relationships.

topics.title: Ricky Lake and Letitia Kline Appearances
topics.summary: The studio features interviews with Ricky Lake regarding her past experiences and new film, followed by a discussion with Letitia Kline about the professional and personal fallout from her appearance on the show.

topics.title: Critique of Eric the Midget's Screenplay
topics.summary: The studio evaluates a new screenplay by Eric the Midget, criticizing its heavy reliance on plagiarism and lack of original content.

topics.title: Adult Film Industry Interviews
topics.summary: The studio hosts adult film stars Casey Parker and Paulina James to discuss their careers, experiences in the industry, and specific scenes from their films.

topics.title: Adult Film Stars Discuss Performances and Awards
topics.summary: The studio features adult film stars discussing their experiences with anal scenes, upcoming award nominations, and performing on a vibrating device for the broadcast.

topics.title: Adult Film Performers and Gossip Game
topics.summary: The studio features adult film performers Paulina James and Casey Parker before transitioning into a segment where guests identify a fake celebrity news story from the National Enquirer.

topics.title: Celebrity Rumors and Holiday Treats
topics.summary: The studio discusses various celebrity rumors involving Kiefer Sutherland and Regis Philbin before transitioning to a segment on local news, including a report on a mall shooting and a humorous exchange regarding holiday chocolates.

topics.title: Super Bowl Ads and Holiday Traditions
topics.summary: The studio discusses the high costs of Super Bowl advertisements, celebrity endorsements for chocolate brands, and the cultural debate over holiday terminology.

topics.title: Pop Culture News and Upcoming Comedy Tours
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including the cultural significance of pubic hair, celebrity news regarding Madonna and Don Imus, upcoming film awards, and a series of comedy tour dates.
